sqlMap.select:
SELECT ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, DEPT_ID, IF( date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, CONCAT(substr(#startDate#,1,11), substr(START_DATE,12)), date_format(date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS START_DATE, IF( date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, CONCAT(substr(#endDate#,1,11), substr(END_DATE,12)), date_format(date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS END_DATE, MODAPPL, REGION, A.MOBILE, BIZSUB, CONTENT, IP, DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, B.TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH, C.DISPLAYNAME AS WRITER_NAME, C.DESCRIPTION AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON (A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON (C.CN = A.WRITER_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = C.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE
(
#pidListArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
)
A.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND ( (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #endDate#) or (date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #endDate#) or (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #endDate#) ) ORDER BY A.TYPE_ID
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_attitude( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, DEPT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, REGION, MOBILE, BIZSUB, CONTENT, IP, DATE_TYPE, TYPE_ID)
VALUES( #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #deptId#, #startDate#, IF(#endDate# = '', null, #endDate#), IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#)
VALUES( #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #deptId#, date_add(#startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), IF(#endDate# = '', null, date_add(#endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select.isEqual: SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_conf WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.sql:
a.WRITER_ID = #userId#
#deptIdList[]#
APPR_USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #apprUserName#,'%')
APPR_USER_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #apprUserName#,'%')
a.WRITER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerName#,'%')
a.WRITER_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerName#,'%')
a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerDeptName#,'%')
a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerDeptName#,'%')
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CHANGE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') >= #startDate#
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CHANGE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') <= #endDate#
a.APPR_STATUS = #type#
AND DELFLAG = 0
ORDER BY $order$
ORDER BY START_DATE DESC
#startPoint#, #endPoint#
sqlMap.select: SELECT a.attitude_id as ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.change_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, a.appr_user_name as APPR_USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status as APPR_STATUS, a.writer_name as WRITER_NAME, a.writer_dept_name as WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT a.attitude_id as ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.change_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, a.appr_user_name as APPR_USER_NAME, b.start_date as START_DATE, a.appr_status as APPR_STATUS, a.writer_name as WRITER_NAME, a.writer_dept_name as WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#

SELECT a.attitude_id as ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.change_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, a.appr_user_name as APPR_USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status as APPR_STATUS, c.type_id as TYPE_ID, c.type_name as TYPE_NAME, c.type_name2 as TYPE_NAME2, a.content as CONTENT FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID inner join tbl_attitude_type c on b.TYPE_ID = c.TYPE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = c.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#

SELECT SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, #endDate#, date_add(IFNULL(END_DATE, START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, #startDate#, date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + COUNT(TYPE_ID) AS SUM_DATE, TYPE_ID FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude WHERE (
#pidListArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03') AND ( (START_DATE >= #startDate# and START_DATE <= #endDate#) or (END_DATE >= #startDate# and END_DATE < #endDate#) or (START_DATE < #startDate# and END_DATE >= #endDate#) ) GROUP BY TYPE_ID
SELECT count(*) FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYDATE, ISSOLAR, ISREPEAT, ISREST, ISUSE, USECOMPANY FROM tbl_holidayList WHERE USECOMPANY = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE SET modappl = #modappl# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
#ids[]#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.FORM_ID, A.FORM_HTML FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_form A INNER JOIN jmocha.tbl_attitude_type B ON A.FORM_ID = B.FORM_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND B.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL( ATTITUDE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT ) VALUES( #attitudeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerTitle#, #writerTitle2#, #writerDeptId#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(#changeDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), #delFlag#, #apprStatus#, #content# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET CONTENT = #content#, CHANGE_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(#changeDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND WRITER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.WRITER_ID, A.DEPT_ID, date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) AS START_DATE, date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) AS END_DATE, A.MODAPPL, A.REGION, A.MOBILE, A.BIZSUB, A.CONTENT, A.IP, A.DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, B.TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH, C.DISPLAYNAME FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.WRITER_ID = C.CN WHERE A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#;
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(#apprDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ,APPR_USER_ID = #userId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = #displayName# ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = #displayName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND
#ids[]#
AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( ATTITUDE_ID, MOD_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT ) SELECT ATTITUDE_ID, (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(MOD_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl_history WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]# ), COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE,
1
2 , CONTENT FROM tbl_attitude_modappl WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_attitude WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: UPDATE tbl_attitude SET TYPE_ID = #typeId#, REGION = #region#, MOBILE = #mobile#, BIZSUB = #bizSub#, CONTENT = #content#, DATE_TYPE = #dateType#, IP = #ipAddress#, START_DATE = date_add(#startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), END_DATE = IF(#endDate# = '', null, date_add(#endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)) WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(APPR_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS APPR_DATE, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT FROM jmocha.tbl_attitude_modappl_history where COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
